headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Crown Castle with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $90
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   initiates coverage on Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $90.
